title: Overview of Historical Data, 1999–2012 - Canada.ca
content:
## Canadian Tobacco Use Monitoring Survey: overview of historical data, 1999 to 2012
- Table 1 - Percentage of current smokers, by age group and sex, age 15+ years, Canada 1999 to 2012
- Table 2 - Percentage of current smokers, by province and age group, age 15+ years, Canada 1999 to 2012
- Table 3 - Percentage of daily smokers, by age group and sex, age 15+ years, Canada 1999 to 2012
- Table 4 - Percentage of daily smokers, by province and age group, age 15+ years, Canada 1999 to 2012
- Table 5 - Percentage of current and daily smokers, by education, age 15+ years, Canada 1999 to 2012
- Table 6 - Average number of cigarettes smoked per day among daily smokers, by age group and sex, age 15+ years, Canada 1999 to 2012
- Table 7 - Percentage of children exposed at home to Environmental Tobacco Smoke ( ETS ), age 0 to 11 years, by province, Canada 1999 to 2012
- Table 8 - Select CTUMS percentages, age 15+ years, Canada 1999 to 2012
